_comment: AgentOS model registry — the single source of truth for which model does what. Code resolves its model from here (lucid_models.get(id)); the audit panel renders it. Edit here, not in code. All entries are LOCAL — nothing leaves this machine. | ADR-0044: each model carries `fetch` (ollama/hf/civitai artifacts) + modality/rating/tier; `bundles` are curated sets the onboarding fetches. Mature lane = explicit opt-in.

models.purpose: Looks at an opening image — uploaded or generated — to flag a real person (asks consent) or a possible minor (hard block) before it can be animated. The deterministic opencv face detector is the primary gate; this model is the real-vs-drawn / age second opinion.
alternatives: moondream — 1.7GB, smaller, more age-conservative (more false minor-blocks)
gemma4:latest — 9.6GB, most accurate but won't load when the GPU is busy
models.notes: Sharper real-vs-drawn + age accuracy than moondream, still small enough to load when the GPU is busy. opencv Haar (CPU) is the deterministic primary; this is the second opinion.

models.purpose: Proposes the 3–4 'what happens next' choices each turn, and expands the chosen one into a motion prompt. Output is schema-validated and red-line-filtered before it can reach the GPU.
alternatives: gemma4:latest — 9.6GB, richer suggestions but slow/wedge-prone to evict; it blocked the video step every turn (the bug fixed here)
moondream — 1.7GB, smallest/fastest to evict but weaker structured-JSON beat-gen
models.notes: Small on purpose: force_evict (ollama stop — the ADR-0018 lever) frees it in ~3s before the heavy i2v lease, and it can coexist with the lighter video models (no eviction needed). Shares qwen2.5vl:3b with B2. Since 2026-06-21 this role is the FRAME GROUNDER (caption+rating, needs vision) and the fallback beat writer; the beat WRITER itself is split out to 'narrator-beats' (a less-timid model). Was gemma4:latest (9.6GB), which evicted slowly and wedged — skipping the dream every turn (ADR-0015 §3).

models.purpose: Writes the 3-4 'what happens next' choices each turn. Split out from 'narrator' so the beat writer can be a less-timid, more imaginative model than the vision grounder. Output is schema-validated and red-line-filtered before it can reach the GPU.
models.source: huggingface: bartowski/MN-12B-Mag-Mell-R1-GGUF (Q5_K_M) — Mistral-Nemo 12B creative-writing merge, ChatML
alternatives: hermes3:3b — 2.0GB, fastest to evict and JSON-reliable, but TIMID in the mature lane (verified euphemistic: 'intimate area' / 'collarbone' / 'Unspoken Promise' even under the directive clause). The cheap-evict fallback; set this role to hermes3:3b on a constrained GPU.
qwen2.5vl:3b — the vision grounder; SEES the frame but timid + thinner on dream-logic. Folds beat-gen back onto the single vision model.
hf.co/bartowski/Rocinante-12B-v1.1-GGUF:Q5_K_M — TheDrummer, tuned hardest for explicit / least positivity bias; the 'hotter' one-line swap if Mag-Mell isn't direct enough.
dolphin3.0-mistral-24b — ~16GB, more disciplined + bold but slower to evict (the ADR-0015/0018 problem); only on a free GPU.
dolphin3.0-qwen2.5:3b — uncensored but BROKE the JSON beat contract (0 beats every call); rejected.
huihui_ai/qwen2.5-abliterate:3b — JSON-reliable but creatively bland and not actually bolder; rejected (crude abliteration follows the two-dial law worse).
models.notes: Mature-lane upgrade 2026-06-21 to fix 'the choices are much too conservative to be useful'. Root cause was the model, not the safety gate (lucid_safety only blocks minors/real-people/non-consent — never general adult). A/B'd vs hermes3:3b on the real path (apps/dreaming/lucid/ab_mature_narrator.py, sensual-but-clothed mature scene): hermes3:3b stayed euphemistic ('hand moves closer to her intimate area', 'collarbone', 'Unspoken Promise') and was flaky on JSON; Mag-Mell-12B was explicit + concrete ('glistening sex', 'fully nude, stroking his erect cock', wax on a breast), kept 3-4/4 distinct beats per roll, honored the two-dial law (small motion / big different idea), and emitted valid JSON every trial. Best-in-class 12B for low-'slop' (non-euphemistic) creative prose + worldbuilding, so it serves the SFW lane too. ~8.7GB Q5_K_M evicts in a few seconds via force_evict (ollama stop) before the i2v lease — heavier than the old 2-3GB narrators but well within the ADR-0015 §3 budget on the 24GB card. TEXT-ONLY: it cannot see the frame, so beat-gen reads the caption the 'narrator' vision pass produced (lucid_engine.NARRATOR_MODEL != MODEL drops the image); the i2v step still continues from the frame pixels, so grounding fidelity is preserved. Revert/tune: set this role's model (hermes3:3b = cheap-evict, Rocinante = hotter), or override at runtime with LUCID_NARRATOR_MODEL. The mature heat itself is steered by _RATING_CLAUSE['mature'] in lucid_engine.py and stays rating-gated (sfw dreams are unaffected).

models.purpose: Renders the dream's opening frame from a typed description. The result still passes B2 (a t2i can render a person too).
models.source: huggingface: BusterBoo99xX/divingIllustriousReal_v40VAE (Illustrious/SDXL, mirror of the Civitai model)
models.notes: Illustrious/SDXL (~28 steps, cfg ~5, 768x1344 = 9:16 to match the i2v frame). Replaced SD-Turbo, which was SFW-only and 512px so it could not seed a pose/anatomy-correct NSFW opening. The description still passes the red-line gate; B2 likeness-gates the rendered frame; predict-before-load refuses rather than OOMs.

models.purpose: The actual dream: animates the current frame into the next clip, last-frame → first-frame, steered by the chosen beat.
models.source: local ComfyUI unet GGUF (wan22_enhNSFW_nolight_cf_Q6K_high/low) via workflows/enhNSFW-nolight-i2v.api.json
models.notes: Non-distilled (real CFG ~3.5, 20 steps) — replaced the distilled Wan2.2-Remix i2v, whose lightning high-noise expert melted anatomy ('anatomy from within anatomy'). Costs ~4x the time per beat; that is the price of not melting. The heavy one: runs only through the VRAM coordinator lease (Spawn/confirm-evict/Release); live inference always outranks it. Revert via LUCID_WORKFLOW=<the Remix .json>.

fetch.note: Civitai model 2053259 — WAN 2.2 Enhanced NSFW SVI nolightning Q6K HIGH
Civitai model 2053259 — WAN 2.2 Enhanced NSFW SVI nolightning Q6K LOW
Civitai model 1307155 (CubeyAI) — WAN General NSFW LoRA, 2.2 HIGH e8
Civitai model 1307155 (CubeyAI) — WAN General NSFW LoRA, 2.2 LOW e8

models.purpose: Which i2v backend run_beat uses: 'wan' (i2v-dream, the default) or '10eros'/'ltx' (i2v-dream-10eros, LTX-2.3). Editable affiliation — flip here or via LUCID_ENGINE to switch the whole shipped path (web, drain, create-from-image).
models.notes: A selector, not a model file. 'wan' -> i2v-dream (Wan 2.2 GGUF + NSFW-22 LoRA split); '10eros'/'ltx' -> build_10eros_i2v (LTX-2.3 GGUF). Default 'wan' preserves prior behavior; nothing changes until flipped.

models.purpose: Alternate i2v engine: TenStrip's 10Eros merge on LTX-2.3, driven by build_10eros_i2v (768px, 28-step LTXVScheduler). Selected via i2v-engine='10eros'.
models.model: TenStrip LTX2.3-10Eros GGUF Q6_K + Gemma-3-12B TE + LTX-2.3 VAEs
models.source: huggingface: vantagewithai/LTX2.3-10Eros-GGUF (Q6_K) + TenStrip/LTX2.3-10Eros (gemma TE) + Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy (video/audio VAE, text projection)
models.notes: Single merged checkpoint (no Wan high/low LoRA split); I2V-only, prompt-driven. 768px + 28 steps = verified hand/detail sweet spot; melting comes from small-subject/large-motion/over-length, not the model. fp8 all-in-one (34GB) doesn't fit 24GB — GGUF is the only clean path. Built by build_10eros_i2v.py; ui_workflow.py emits the canvas version. Same VRAM-coordinator lease as i2v-dream (the heavy one).

models.purpose: The model behind Hermes' chat and agent turns. The LIVE default lives in ~/.hermes/config.yaml (model.default) — Hermes owns it (ADR-0001); AgentOS tracks it here only for currency research, the family policy, and the audit panel. config.yaml stays the single source of truth for what is actually running (ADR-0049).
alternatives: qwen3.6:27b — same family, 32K context (lighter KV cache)
gemma4-26b-64k — 15GB, different family; verify it stays on-GPU under live load before adopting
hermes4-14b — 15GB, Nous Hermes family; smaller, evicts faster
models.notes: Added in ADR-0049 so the inference LLM — whose VRAM footprint is the substrate's central concern (ADR-0018/0024) — stops being a registry blind spot. NOT auto-fetched: it is config-owned and present. Setting this default LIVE in ~/.hermes/config.yaml is ADR-0049 Phase 2 (gated on a measured coexistence canary + evict + fallback_model); Phase 1 only reads the current value for display. The agentos value here may lag the live config — the Hermes adapter reads config.yaml directly for the live default.

bundles.desc: Chat / story text — narrator + beat-writer + the safety vision model. All Ollama, no account.
bundles.why: Start here — fast, no account, and the text model writes prompts for the rest.

bundles.desc: Text-to-opening image + the safety check. divingIllustrious from a free HF mirror, no account.
The LTX-2.3 (10Eros) dream lane. 18+ (mature) — needs an age affirmation, but every weight is a free HuggingFace mirror (no token).
The Wan 2.2 Enhanced-NSFW dream lane (the default). 18+ (mature) — needs an age affirmation + a free Civitai token for the checkpoint + anatomy LoRAs.
bundles.why: Needs the ComfyUI runtime + a Civitai token for the 18+ models.
